quests.name: The Mystic's Summons
quests.description: Amuun has called for you. Dark forces stir in the realm.
dialogueStart: Ah, it's you... The prophecies spoke of your arrival.
A great darkness threatens our realm. The undead rise from Swerdfield.
Prove yourself. Slay the undead, then report to the Guildmaster.
dialogueCompletion: So Amuun sent you? Not bad for a recruit.
The undead are organizing. Their knights must fall.

quests.name: The Fallen Knights
quests.description: Break the undead knights and investigate the old shrine.
dialogueStart: Knights of the old watch have risen — they are rallying the dead.
Cut them down, then check the old shrine to the northeast. Something festers there.
dialogueCompletion: The shrine is corrupted... Just as I feared.
This is the Warden's doing. It is time to end him.

quests.name: The Ashen Warden
quests.description: Enter the ruins and defeat the Ashen Warden.

objectives.description: Complete the run: Ashen Wastes (defeat the Ashen Warden)

dialogueStart: The Warden waits in the ruins beyond the portal.
Take a party or go alone — but come back alive.
dialogueCompletion: The Warden has fallen... yet this was only the first seal.
This darkness runs deeper than I thought. Rest now — you will be needed.
